rationale_overall: At cap (24 of 24) with full coverage of every profile-named wave: AI/semis (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, AMD, TSM = 6), AI-applied/robotics (BOTZ, ISRG, CGNX = 3), space (RKLB, ARKX = 2), defense (LMT, NOC, ITA = 3), nuclear (CCJ, URA, CEG, BWXT = 4), quantum (IONQ = 1), geopolitical_energy (LNG, XLE = 2), cyber as a secondary geopolitical exposure (CIBR = 1), broad-market hedge (SPY, XLV = 2). No thesis breaks: NVDA Q3 datacenter held up despite gaming weakness (NVDA Q3 FY23 release 2022-11-16); LMT/NOC/ITA still riding the post-Ukraine NATO 2%-of-GDP floor that BofA flagged as a multi-year defense-spend reset; CCJ/URA backed by Cameco's 50M-lb 2022 contract additions and the China Nuclear International supply deal (2022-11); LNG/XLE backed by Cheniere shipping ~70% of 2022 production to Europe as Russian pipeline flows fell ~70 bcm; CGNX disappointed on the June fire and logistics slowdown but the secular factory-automation thesis is intact and a quarter-end is not the moment to capitulate. ChatGPT's 2022-11-30 launch reinforces the AI-wave thesis without requiring a new ticker — the existing six AI/semi names are exactly the listed beneficiaries. Engineered biology is explicitly excluded by the profile, so no synbio adds. The watchlist is well-balanced; forcing a pair-swap at this date would be churn for its own sake. no_changes is the disciplined call.

news_evidence.summary: ChatGPT public preview launches; hits 1M users in 5 days. Validates the LLM/generative-AI thesis already covered by NVDA/AMD/TSM/MSFT/GOOGL — no new ticker needed.

Cameco signs uranium supply agreement with China Nuclear International Corporation; year-to-date Cameco added 50M lb to its long-term contract portfolio — confirms the CCJ/URA nuclear-revival thesis on the watchlist.
Cheniere shipped ~70% of its 2022 production to Europe, covering ~30% of the >70 bcm reduction in Russian pipeline supply — confirms LNG and XLE geopolitical-energy exposures.

Rocket Lab Q3 2022 record revenue $63.1M (+1,093% YoY), 9 orbital missions in 2022, Neutron development accelerating with NASA Stennis selection — RKLB and ARKX theses intact despite ARKX 2022 drawdown of -34%.
NATO members implementing or proposing defense-spending lifts that make 2% of GDP a floor (not a goal) per BofA analysts — multi-year tailwind for LMT, NOC, ITA holdings.
